result.stdout:
Description:
  Downloads the DataMiner Sdk to your local cache.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.Sdk.Download [options]

Options:
  --debug         Indicates the tool should write out debug logging. [default: False]
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
